org.apache.paimon.casting

Interface CastRule<IN,OUT>

  • Type Parameters:
    IN - Input internal type
    OUT - Output internal type

    public interface CastRule<IN,OUT>
    A CastRule provides the logic to create a CastExecutor starting from the input and the target types. A rule is matched using CastRulePredicate.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      CastExecutor<IN,OUT> create(DataType inputType, DataType targetType)
      Create a CastExecutor starting from the provided input type.
      CastRulePredicate getPredicateDefinition() 

    • Method Detail

      • getPredicateDefinition

        CastRulePredicate getPredicateDefinition()
        See Also:
        for more details about a cast rule predicate definition.

      • create

        CastExecutor<IN,OUT> create(DataType inputType,
                            DataType targetType)
        Create a CastExecutor starting from the provided input type. The returned CastExecutor assumes the input value is using the internal data type, and it's a valid value for the provided targetType.
